notes: Case 2004-2 (Appeal of Nancy J. Plowman vs. Philadelphia Presbytery) appears only as a docket-list entry on page 61, where it is listed among cases that 'were not completed in time for the SJC March meeting and await final determination by the full SJC in October.' The actual decision opinion for the related Plowman case is documented under Case 2002-5 (Refiled) on pages 62-69 of the same volume. Case 2004-2 is the appeal form of Case 2002-5 (the original complaint), but no separate opinion text for case 2004-2 itself appears in this volume.
